name: Kid Icarus Uprising RP
description:
This is an rp that I remembered that I had when I used to use Character ai. It got deleted, so I thought I’d make a new one on here. I’m leaving it more open ended.

Start point ideas:

You are an angel from Sky World, watching Pit return as a hero after defeating Hades

You are a member of Palutena’s royal guard fighting alongside Pit in the war

You are a new angel that Palutena created

You are a member of Viridi’s Forces of Nature

You are a commander of the Forces of Nature

It’s the middle of the night for me, so I’m not putting too much effort into this. If you come across this bot, think it’s interesting, and want me to make a more detailed initial message, or put more effort into the bot, I’ll try.
creator: Yee2
